Your Toothbrush Could Be Making You Sick — Here's What Thousands Are Doing About It

SEE TODAY'S SPECIAL OFFER

Over 1,500+ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5-Star Reviews — FDA-Registered — Dentist Recommended

"Not only does it give me incredible peace of mind that I’m not putting harmful bacteria into my mouth, but it’s so easy to grab for weekends away."

Most people have no idea their toothbrush is one of the dirtiest objects in their home.

They feel run down. Low energy. Recurring congestion, body aches, or a cough that won't quit — and they can't figure out why.

The culprit could be sitting on their bathroom counter right now.

Research shows the average toothbrush harbors over 100 million bacteria cells — crawling across the bristles, multiplying between every use.1

And every time those bristles go in someone's mouth, those germs go with them — straight into the body.

Here's what most people don't realize: The bacteria and viruses on a toothbrush can come from the sink, other toothbrushes sitting nearby, or worst of all… from the toilet!

Every single flush sends a "toilet plume" of aerosolized fecal particles into the air — and those particles land directly on exposed toothbrush bristles.7

Think about that for a moment: 100 MILLION bacteria cells going into someone's mouth, twice a day, every single day.

And the consequences go far beyond a bad taste. The germs festering on a dirty toothbrush have been linked to – digestive issues, weakened immune response, diarrhea, and even increased risk of heart disease, diabetes and more.2

But there's good news.

Thousands of families have already discovered a breakthrough product that eliminates this invisible health risk, for anyone who wants to keep their toothbrush free of germs and improve their overall wellbeing!

For the first time, people can use the same technology trusted by hospitals and dentists to kill 99.9% of the germs on a toothbrush – safely, easily, quickly, and all naturally. And it's all thanks to this revolutionary device called Bril.

What is it?

Bril (short for "Brilliant") is a portable toothbrush case that automatically sterilizes your toothbrush after every use.

It contains a built-in UltraViolet (UV-C) light that kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses on contact – the same harmful organisms that cause illness when transferred from brush to mouth.

The concept is simple: Instead of waiting until bacteria are already inside the mouth, Bril eliminates germs at the source (the toothbrush) – before they ever reach the mouth.

It's the most effective way families are protecting themselves from one of the most overlooked sources of germs… the toothbrush. Dentists are already recommending it, and once people try it, most say everyone in their household should be using one!

How Does it Work?

The secret behind Bril is the germ-killing power of its built-in ultraviolet (UV-C) light.

UV-C is a specific frequency of ultraviolet light — the same type produced naturally by the sun. But it's not just any type of UV light. Bril uses UV-C, which is clinically proven to be even more effective at killing germs than other types of UV light.

UV-C light is proven to kill 99.9% of germs on the molecular level by destroying the DNA of germs – including viruses, mold, fungi, and bacteria.4 This stops germs in their tracks and prevents them from spreading to the mouth (and then the rest of the body).

A CDC study even confirms that UV-C light kills the same germs that cause diarrhea, pneumonia, meningitis, and urinary tract infections.5

The FDA also recognizes UV light as an effective method for sterilizing medical equipment.6

With so much evidence that UV-C light works, it's no wonder it is also used by professionals to sanitize hospitals, schools, and even the International Space Station!

Bril's UV-C light is safely enclosed inside the case, ensuring the light reaches every bristle on your brush for a complete 360º sterilization. It really is "Bril-liant"!

Is it Easy to Use?

This is the part people love most about Bril – there's literally nothing extra to do.

To use Bril, simply place the toothbrush inside and close the lid.

Bril automatically activates its germ-killing UV-C light the moment the lid closes, and shuts off when the sterilization cycle is complete.

That's really all there is to it – no funky liquids to soak a brush in, no batteries to replace, and no complicated technology.

Even better, the battery lasts up to 30 DAYS on a single charge so users rarely even think about it! And since Bril doubles as a protective case and magnetic wall-mount holder, it's perfect for both home use and travel.

Families love Bril – not only does it provide peace of mind knowing mouths are better protected from germs, but it's also super convenient.

Just think about it… the second a toothbrush goes back in the holder, it begins disinfecting automatically – keeping bristles germ-free until the next use. (Sounds kinda futuristic, doesn't it?)

Plus it doesn't just kill germs, Bril also doubles as a sealed protective barrier — blocking airborne bacteria, toilet plume particles, and contact germs from reaching the toothbrush head between uses.

The compact case design makes it perfect for travel too.

On the back of the case, there's even a built-in magnet to mount Bril on a mirror or wall — keeping it off the counter, away from the toilet, and making the bathroom look cleaner instantly.

Thousands of customers see it the same way: a toothbrush needs to be stored somewhere anyway. Why not store it in something that also sterilizes it safely? Honestly, Bril is an incredible breakthrough in home dental care. It's no surprise that families everywhere are making it part of their daily routine!

What Else People Love About Bril

  • Every Brush Feels Brand New – Bril's 360º ultra-deep sterilization cleans the toothbrush head from all sides, all the way down to the base of the bristles. Users say it's like brushing with a fresh toothbrush every single time!
  • Dentist-Approved & Recommended – Bril is already being recommended by doctors and dentists around the world as a no-brainer item that everyone should be using. It's the kind of product health professionals wish every patient had.
  • Small & Portable (Great For Travel!) – no need to compromise health while on the road. Bril is about the size of an AirPods case, making it ideal for travel. It easily fits in a toiletry bag and lasts for 30 days without needing to be recharged.
  • It Fits All Toothbrushes – electric, standard, large or small… Bril works with them all! (Yes – even small children's brushes and oddly shaped electric brushes!)
  • 24/7 Toothbrush Protection – forget that germ-collecting cup sitting on the sink! Bril doesn't just sterilize — it creates a sealed physical barrier that keeps germs out around the clock while the brush isn't being used.
  • The Perfect Gift For The Whole Family – Bril comes in an array of stylish colors, making it easy to tell which brush belongs to whom. Customers regularly buy 3, 5, or even 8 at a time for their entire household!
  • 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee – not 100% satisfied? Return it, hassle-free. No questions asked. The company stands behind every single unit.

As Seen In

Bril has been featured across major media outlets — and it's easy to see why. With over 1,500 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5-STAR REVIEWS and counting, Bril is quickly becoming a household name in oral health.

People don't just love Bril because it works — they love how effortless it is. Place the brush in. Close the lid. Walk away.

And with an average unit costing less than a single dental cleaning, there's really no reason not to try right now! Best of all, there's ABSOLUTELY NO RISK to give Bril a try. The company stands behind the product with a full 30-day money-back guarantee. Don't love it? Send it back for a complete refund. (But based on 1,500+ five-star reviews, most people aren't sending theirs back.)

Thousands of families have already made the switch — and they're never going back to an unprotected toothbrush.
